# Documentation Heading Scaffolds

Use these heading layouts as starter structures. Keep the sections you need and remove the ones that do not apply.

## README Scaffold

```markdown
# Project Name

## Purpose

## Architecture Overview

## Prerequisites

## Quick Start

## Configuration

## Development Workflow

## Testing and Validation

## Deployment

## Security Considerations

## Troubleshooting

## Ownership and Support
```

## Runbook Scaffold

```markdown
# Runbook: <System or Service>

## Scope

## Preconditions

## Alerts and Symptoms

## Triage Steps

## Recovery Steps

## Verification

## Escalation

## Rollback

## Post-Incident Follow-up
```

## ADR Scaffold

```markdown
# ADR: <Decision Title>

## Status

## Context

## Decision

## Consequences

## Alternatives Considered

## Follow-up Actions
```

## Change Note Scaffold

```markdown
# Change Note: <Feature or Release>

## Summary

## Impact

## Required Actions

## Migration Steps

## Rollback Plan

## Validation Plan

## References
```

## PRD Scaffold

```markdown
# Product Requirements Document: <Feature Name>

## Problem Statement

## Goals

## Non-Goals

## User Personas and Use Cases

## Functional Requirements

## Non-Functional Requirements

## Success Metrics

## Constraints and Assumptions

## Risks and Open Questions

## Rollout and Adoption Plan
```

## Technical Spec Scaffold

```markdown
# Technical Specification: <Feature Name>

## Context

## Scope

## Out of Scope

## Architecture Overview

## Data Model and Storage Changes

## API and Interface Contracts

## Security and Privacy Considerations

## Reliability and Failure Modes

## Implementation Plan

## Testing Strategy

## Rollout and Rollback Plan

## Observability

## Risks and Mitigations

## Open Questions
```
